title: Web development
description: Websites and web apps, CMS-driven, fast and maintainable. Built so non-technical clients can manage their own content.

title: Mobile apps
description: Cross-platform iOS + Android with React Native. From idea to working product including backend, auth, and data.

title: Automations & workflows
description: Workflows that save time and cut manual work. Booking flows, CRM syncs, AI-assisted pipelines.

title: Integrations
description: Connecting tools that don't talk to each other. OTAs, booking platforms, delivery apps, payment providers, CRMs.

title: Tech + operations
description: I can build the system and help run it. Good for small teams without a dedicated tech person.

title: Whatever the project needs
description: Scrapers, dashboards, internal tools, Figma mockups, SEO setup. I scope it, build it, hand it over cleanly.
